summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 10 warning, 10 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: ЁЯЯб bin/lib/validator-parsers.mjs:311 тАФ Stale comment referencing deleted `isGenericJson` function; update to describe actual optimization

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/validator-parsers.mjs:119` тАФ `parseTAP` regex requires `-` separator; TAP lines like `not ok 1 bare description` (no dash) silently fail to match. Add a fallback capture group to avoid false negatives

ЁЯЯб SPEC.md:39 тАФ `detectAndParse` signature drift: spec says `(stdout, artifactDir, config)` тЖТ `{ findings, formatDetected }`, but implementation is `(text)` тЖТ `Array<Finding>`. Spec should be updated before downstream tasks (task-8, task-12) build against stale API contract.
ЁЯЯб STATE.json:2 тАФ Data integrity: `feature.status` is `"completed"` but all 17 tasks are `"blocked"`. Contradictory state will confuse dashboards.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/gate.mjs:69` тАФ `buildConfigOverride` path-traversal guard for `outputFile` is untested; add a test with `../../etc/passwd`
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/gate.mjs:286` тАФ `internalError` catch block (FAIL safety net) has no test forcing that path
ЁЯЯб `test/parsers.test.mjs` тАФ `runGateInline` tests never exercise artifact-writing (always pass `null` for taskId)
### Previously flagged ЁЯЯб issues тАФ both FIXED:

ЁЯФ┤ `bin/lib/validator-parsers.mjs:337-339` тАФ Three alias re-exports (`parseJunit`, `parseTap`, `parseGhaMatcher`) rename functions that should be defined with their spec-mandated names from the start. The module exports 9 names for 6 functions, and two test files import different name variants for the same functions. **Fix:** rename function definitions to match spec, delete 3 alias lines (~15 lines changed).

ЁЯЯб `test/validator-parsers.test.mjs:1-169` тАФ Duplicate test file. All 20 tests overlap with the 124 tests in `test/parsers.test.mjs`. Only unique value is the export-existence check. Merge it and delete.
ЁЯЯб `test/parsers.test.mjs:1` тАФ Stale header comment references deleted `parsers.mjs`.
